transformations.name: JoinDeptEmployee
transformations.description: Inner join Department and Employee on Department_id

source.sqlReaderQuery: SELECT * FROM dbo.ADF_Config_Table WHERE load_type = 'Delta' AND is_active = 1

sqlReaderQuery.value: @concat('SELECT MAX(', item().watermark_column, ') AS new_watermark FROM ', item().source_schema, '.', item().source_table)
@concat('SELECT last_watermark FROM dbo.watermark_table WHERE table_name = ''', item().source_table, '''')

@concat('SELECT * FROM ', item().source_schema, '.', item().source_table, ' WHERE ', item().watermark_column, ' > ''', activity('Lookup_OldWatermark').output.firstRow.last_watermark, ''' AND ', item().watermark_column, ' <= ''', activity('Lookup_NewWatermark').output.firstRow.new_watermark, '''')
